terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.intro: These Terms & Conditions govern your use of this portfolio website operated by Manish Gupta. By accessing the site, you agree to these terms.

sections.heading: Use of the website
paragraphs: The content on this site is provided for informational purposes about my professional services and projects. You may view and download materials such as the resume PDF for personal, non-commercial reference related to hiring or collaboration inquiries.
You agree not to misuse the site, attempt unauthorized access to any systems, or use automated means to scrape the site in a way that degrades service for others.

sections.heading: Intellectual property
paragraphs: Unless otherwise stated, text, layout, and branding on this portfolio are owned by Manish Gupta. Project descriptions may reference client or third-party trademarks solely for factual context; ownership of those marks remains with their respective owners.
Screenshots or imagery used for illustrative purposes may be stock photography where noted; project-specific assets are used in line with client agreements.

sections.heading: Limitation of liability
paragraphs: The site is provided as is. To the fullest extent permitted by law, I am not liable for any indirect or consequential loss arising from your use of the site or reliance on any information published here.
Nothing in these terms excludes liability that cannot be limited under applicable law.

sections.heading: Contact
paragraphs: For questions about these terms, use the contact form on this site or email manishgupta0746@gmail.com.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This policy explains how information is handled when you use this portfolio website.

sections.heading: Information you provide
paragraphs: If you submit the contact form, I collect the fields you enter (such as name, email, optional phone number, and message) solely to respond to your inquiry or to engage on a potential project.
Do not submit passwords, government IDs, or other highly sensitive data through the contact form.

sections.heading: How contact submissions are processed
paragraphs: Submissions may be delivered by email to the address configured for this site (for example via EmailJS or a similar provider). Those providers process data according to their own privacy policies; I recommend reviewing their documentation if you have concerns.
Messages are retained only as long as needed for correspondence and legitimate business follow-up, unless a longer period is required by law.

sections.heading: Analytics and cookies
paragraphs: This portfolio uses Google Analytics to help analyze how visitors use the site. Google Analytics uses cookies to collect standard internet log information and visitor behavior information in an anonymous form.

The information generated by the cookie about your use of the website (including IP address) is transmitted to Google. This information is then used to evaluate visitors' use of the website and to compile statistical reports on website activity. You can opt-out of Google Analytics by installing the Google Analytics Opt-out Browser Add-on.

sections.heading: Your rights
paragraphs: Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have rights to access, correct, or delete personal data I hold about you. Contact me using the details on this site to make a request.

sections.heading: Changes
paragraphs: I may update this policy from time to time. The last updated date at the top reflects the latest revision.
